title: Ritual Bodywork
tagline: Therapeutic touch that meets your body exactly where it is.
description1: My approach to massage is deeply intuitive and client-led. I believe that the body holds its own wisdom, and my role is to listen and respond to what it needs in each moment. Whether you’re seeking relief from physical tension, emotional release, or simply a nurturing space to reconnect with your body, this work is designed to meet you where you are and support your unique needs. I draw from a variety of techniques — including Swedish massage, deep tissue work, myofascial release, trigger point therapy, lymphatic drainage, and restorative touch — tailoring each session to your specific goals and preferences.
description2: I integrate breathwork, somatic awareness, and intention-setting into each session to enhance the therapeutic benefits and support holistic well-being.
whoIsThisFor: Massage for women at all stages of life, from pregnancy to menopause and beyond. Whether you’re seeking relief from physical tension, emotional release, or simply a nurturing space to reconnect with your body, this work is designed to meet you where you are and support your unique needs.
